pages.title: Git Hooks
pages.preview: Automate kluster.ai code reviews with git hooks. Install pre-commit or pre-push hooks to catch issues before they reach your repository.

pages.title: CLI Installation
pages.preview: Install kluster-cli on macOS, Linux, or Windows. Set up shell completions, configure your PATH, and keep the CLI up to date.

pages.title: CLI Quickstart
pages.preview: Learn how to install kluster-cli, authenticate with your API key, and review your first changes. No IDE or CI pipeline required.

pages.title: CLI Reference
pages.preview: Reference for kluster.ai CLI commands, configuration options, and exit codes, with quick lookups for flags, config settings, and environment variables.

pages.title: Repo Reviews from CLI
pages.preview: Trigger and monitor system-wide repo reviews from your terminal using kluster-cli, with a terminal-first workflow for codebase analysis.

pages.title: Review Commands
pages.preview: Review staged changes, diffs, branches, and individual files with kluster-cli. Choose between instant and deep analysis modes.

pages.title: .klusterignore
pages.preview: Exclude files and folders from kluster.ai Code Reviews with a .gitignore-compatible .klusterignore file, using patterns, wildcards, and negation.

pages.title: Options
pages.preview: Configure kluster.ai Code Review settings, from analysis depth and sensitivity levels to issue types and enabled tools used to verify code across your workflow.

pages.title: Custom rules
pages.preview: Learn how to define and manage custom code review rules to enforce consistent code quality, using manual rules or learned rules from GitHub repositories.

pages.title: Set Up Jira Integration for Code Reviews
pages.preview: Connect Jira to kluster.ai to review code against ticket requirements. Set up Jira Cloud or self-hosted Jira and learn how ticket context flows into reviews.

outline.title: How Jira context flows into reviews

pages.title: External Knowledge Quickstart for Reviews
pages.preview: Connect external sources like Jira to kluster.ai so code reviews can verify your code against real project requirements and specifications.

pages.title: Code Reviews Frequently Asked Questions
pages.preview: Find answers to common questions about kluster.ai Code Review, covering setup, supported IDEs, review modes, security, and troubleshooting topics.

pages.title: Install kluster.ai Code Reviews for Your IDE or CLI
pages.preview: Set up kluster.ai Code Reviews in minutes. Scan code for errors, vulnerabilities, and performance issues in Cursor, VS Code, JetBrains, and more.

pages.title: Pick Your Code Review Workflow
pages.preview: Compare the supported Code Reviews modes—human-written, AI-generated, CLI, and repo-wide—and pick the workflow that fits how you write code.

pages.title: Automatic reviews for AI-generated code
pages.preview: Set up automatic code reviews and dependency checks for AI-generated code. Reviews run in real-time as your AI writes code.

pages.title: AI-generated code review examples
pages.preview: Real-world examples of AI-generated code reviews with kluster.ai, demonstrating how Code Reviews catches critical issues across different IDEs and frameworks.

pages.title: Cursor - Firebase Authentication with Next.js
pages.preview: See how Code Reviews catches critical issues in real-time while migrating from local storage to Firebase authentication.

outline.title: Key issues caught by Code Reviews

pages.title: VS Code - Secure Admin Endpoints with Express
pages.preview: Learn how Code Reviews prevents critical security vulnerabilities when AI creates admin endpoints with hardcoded credentials.

pages.title: On-demand reviews for AI-generated code
pages.preview: Ask your AI assistant to review existing code on demand. Audit files, check for security issues, or verify code quality.

pages.title: Automatic reviews for human-written code
pages.preview: Enable automatic reviews to scan uncommitted changes after you stop typing. Learn how kluster.ai detects idle time and surfaces results.

pages.title: On-demand reviews for human-written code
pages.preview: Trigger on-demand code reviews in your IDE using right-click, hint buttons, or pre-commit scanning to verify code quality on your own terms.

pages.title: Bitbucket PR Reviews Setup
pages.preview: Connect the kluster.ai bot to Bitbucket to automatically review every pull request. Set up the integration with an API token in a few steps.

pages.title: GitHub PR Reviews Setup
pages.preview: Connect the kluster.ai bot to GitHub to automatically review every pull request. Authorize via OAuth and install the GitHub App in two steps.

pages.title: GitLab PR Reviews Setup
pages.preview: Connect the kluster.ai bot to GitLab to automatically review every merge request. Set up the integration with an access token in a few steps.

pages.title: PR Reviews Quickstart
pages.preview: Automatically review every pull request with the kluster.ai bot. Get summary reports and inline comments on GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket.

pages.title: MCP Tools Reference
pages.preview: Learn how kluster.ai Code MCP tools work, including parameters, response formats, issue categories, and settings for real-time code reviews.

pages.title: Response Schema
pages.preview: Understand the response format from kluster.ai Code Reviews—issue structure, severity levels, priority system, and suggested fixes.

pages.title: Repo Reviews Quickstart
pages.preview: Learn how to run system-wide codebase analysis with kluster.ai Repo Reviews to find cross-module bugs that slip through PR-level reviews.

pages.title: Code Reviews - Modes, Features, and Setup
pages.preview: Learn how to use kluster.ai's Code Reviews to validate your code in real time—detecting bugs, security issues, and quality problems so you can ship safely.

pages.title: Troubleshooting
pages.preview: Fix common problems with kluster.ai Code Reviews—from extension issues to CLI errors—across all supported IDEs and workflows.
